specSection:
seedExamples :: () → ()
seedExamples() =
  | ¬empty(backlog/docs/) ∨ ¬empty(backlog/decisions/) → skip
  | otherwise → {
      backlog document create <onboardingDocTitle> --type guide,
      backlog decision create  <templateDecisionTitle> --status "Accepted"
    }
ground_truth_rationale: backlog/decisions/ is non-empty, so ¬empty(backlog/decisions/) is true. The OR condition is satisfied, triggering 'skip'. Either docs/ or decisions/ being non-empty is sufficient to skip seeding.
